import sys
from io import StringIO

# Redirect stdout to capture the print output
sys.stdout = StringIO()

with open("main.py", "r") as f:
    code = f.read()
    exec(code)

# Get the captured output
output = sys.stdout.getvalue()

# Restore stdout
sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__

print(output)
